data.title: Create TECHNICAL-DEBT.md manifest tracking all TODO/FIXME/HACK comments
data.description: 40 TODO-family comments in plugin code (18 TODO, 12 FIXME, 6 HACK, 4 WORKAROUND) with no central registry. Create plugins/dso/docs/TECHNICAL-DEBT.md grouped by category with ticket IDs where applicable. Update retro-gather.sh to emit diff vs manifest. AC: manifest complete, retro-gather shows delta.
